seoTitle: Yoongarillup vs Yornaning — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yoongarillup and Yornaning. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yoongarillup and Yornaning.
heading: Yoongarillup vs Yornaning — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yoongarillup, Western Australia and Yornaning, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yoongarillup has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Yornaning (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yoongarillup or Yornaning safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yoongarillup has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Yornaning scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yoongarillup scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Yornaning scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yoongarillup or Yornaning?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yoongarillup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
